Video.summary: Brittany's twin seems ready, willing and able to pick up her slack; Junior offers his wife a symbolic gesture of his love and commitment, but she has moved on; Becca is crazy about her boyfriend.
Video.title: I Had Sex With My Baby Mama's Twin

Image.alt: I Had Sex With My Baby Mama's Twin
I Had Sex With My Baby Mama's Twin
I Had Sex With My Baby Mama's Twin

Video.summary: Alex, who left his girlfriend while she was pregnant, wants her back; Ciarra faces Trice's wrath for sleeping with her boyfriend.
Video.title: Halloween: I'm Sorry Boo

Video.summary: Torrance admits to cheating on his girlfriend with a transsexual. Then, Heather wants her boyfriend’s ex Tramisha to stop interfering with their relationship.
Video.title: Sizzling Sex Secrets!

Video.summary: A woman thinks she is entitled to sleep with her mother's boyfriend since she is the sole breadwinner in the family.
Video.title: 999,999 Little Pieces

Video.summary: Jeda says that she's desperately in love with Steven. They were engaged until her sister Kayla stepped in and stole her man. Then, Ashley says that things in her life would be great if it wasn't for her boyfriend Phil's ex girlfriend Shanna.
Video.title: Sabotaged!

Video.summary: A woman acts as her daughter's pimp; a man's mother and girlfriend feud.
Video.title: Aspiring Prostitutes & a Drunk

Video.summary: Dustin admits to cheating on his partner with his middle-school crush; psychic Nana says she has a premonition that her fiance is sleeping with her friend; Desiree believes that another woman is contending with her over her boyfriend.
Video.title: Frenemies Attack!

Video.summary: Felicia is here to confront her boyfriend and her mother who have been sleeping together for months! Next Susan must come clean to her boyfriend and tell him she's prostituting again!
Video.title: Brawlin' Broads!

Video.summary: Summer feels no remorse for having sex with her best friend's boyfriend; Simone confirms that she has something going on with her boyfriend's uncle; Travis' budding career as a hip-hop performer gets in the way of his relationship with Marissa.
Video.title: Ice Cold Breakups

Video.summary: Priscilla's boyfriend admits to cheating but blames her and her pregnancy for his behavior; Santana says he is willing to change, but his actions may be too little, too late; Scoota wants the benefits of a relationship without the attachment.
Video.title: I Cheated Because You're Pregnant

Video.summary: Edwina slept with Mike, her godsister’s fiance! Robert’s man has been fantasizing about a woman named Morgan! Mimi will fight to keep her cheating man Trayl from her best friend Keisha!
Video.title: You've Been Caught!

Video.summary: Fred deceived his lover, Jay, so now Jay is holding Fred gets revenge. Next Terry's obsession over his stuffed panda, Yogi, is about to drive his girlfriend out of his life! Then Benny will tell his buddy that he secretly wears women's underwear.
Video.title: Amazing Tales

Video.summary: A man suspects his girlfriend is sleeping with his uncle; a woman's boyfriend cheats with her friend.
Video.title: Five People, 8 Dogs, One Trailer

Video.summary: Kiki taught Kat the ropes whens he started in the strip clubs and then they became lovers. But now Kat is dumping Kiki for a man! Later Cedric is here to tell his girlfriend that he wants to join him in a threesome with his secret lover, Eric!
Video.title: Two-timers Confronted

Video.summary: Thomas' baby's mama and fiancee demand that he choose between them; Autumn reveals her true identity to a man who is interested in her; Alyse is blind-sided by her boyfriend's ruthless rejection.
Video.title: I'm Not His Cousin, I'm His Fiancee

Image.alt: I'm Not His Cousin, I'm His Fiancee
I'm Not His Cousin, I'm His Fiancee
I'm Not His Cousin, I'm His Fiancee

Video.summary: A man impregnates his girlfriend's cousin.
Video.title: Steve & A Pregnant Girl

Video.summary: The guests on today's show say they need to break free from their love triangles and fight for the one's they love.
Video.title: Scorned Lovers Fight Back

Video.summary: SpringerCam joins Sam on a trucking trip where he professes his love and devotion for two women. Then Edward is here to confess to his wife that he's been having an affair with her sister! When the two sisters confront Edward, he's goin' home alone!
Video.title: I'm Leaving My Wife!

Video.summary: Destiny confronts her friend about trespassing on other people's property; a confession of epic proportions could be a deal breaker; a hidden secret may alter a couple's plans.
Video.title: Stone Cold Sisters

Video.summary: Taylor's fiance reveals the truth; Falin wants her engaged friend to know that she has been hooking up with her man; Yashisca's fiance wants to get all of his skeletons out of the closet before taking a trip down the aisle.
Video.title: Bossy Brides

Video.summary: When John was sent away to prison, he asked brother Derrick to help take care of his family, but he never imagined Derrick would hook up with his baby mama! Then, John's tired of being Crystal's meal ticket and taking care of her family.
Video.title: Both Brothers Wanna Marry Me

Video.summary: Wanda thinks Jason has been visiting the pancake house for more than pancakes! Carl’s fling Melanie has a big secret about his sister’s man! Dave’s girlfriend Shannon has been sleeping with a stripper!
Video.title: Short Stack Smackdown

Video.summary: Kristin and her special skill set stand in the way of Rikki's trip down the aisle; Eric did something he regrets and asks his wife to forgive him; Danielle fears that her boyfriend cheated with her cousin Qwon.
Video.title: Now That's a Mouthful

Video.summary: Anita is ready to dump her husband for her ex-lover. Next Theresa is cheating on her fiancé with his brother! Later Kevin is here to ell his girlfriend's ex, Jermaine, to back off.
Video.title: It's Your Fault I'm Cheating!

Video.summary: A woman sleeps with her twin sister's boyfriend; a man is caught between two women; a man asks a friend to lie for him.
Video.title: I Slept With Your Twin & Your Mom

Image.alt: I Slept With Your Twin & Your Mom
I Slept With Your Twin & Your Mom
I Slept With Your Twin & Your Mom

Video.summary: Josh and Amy will find out today that their partners have been unfaithful. Next Madeline reveals to Andre that she's been sleeping with Diante. Then Quincy is engaged to Callie but what Callie doesn't know is that Quincy has been cheating with Amy.
Video.title: Invasion of the Angry Lovers

Video.summary: A woman sleeps with her brother; a woman leaves her controlling husband; a woman sleeps with her husband's sister; a man impregnates his mistress.
Video.title: My Brother Is My Lover

Video.summary: After Mike became a dad, he felt trapped and bored from fatherhood and found Liz! Sherrie fights to win Don back from his gay lover Warren! Gloria’s matchmaking days are over as her best friend Andrea slept with her fiancé!
Video.title: I Need More Than You

Video.summary: Porn stars and strippers today: Heidi tells her boyfriend Dave about her career in porn. Then, Aurora, decides she’s done with men and has a secret for her boyfriend Bryan!
Video.title: It's Your Sexy Job or Me

Image.alt: It's Your Sexy Job or Me
It's Your Sexy Job or Me
It's Your Sexy Job or Me

Video.summary: Beep runs a convenience store and he's fallen in love with the girlfriend of one of the patrons.
Video.title: Amazing Tales IV

Video.summary: A woman is ready to give up nine years of marriage; a woman confronts her husband and his Internet lover.
Video.title: 7 Kids, a Trucker & Waffles

Video.summary: Deja confronts her child's father to find out why she found her friend's number on his call log; Christian wanted to do the right thing after fathering a baby, then hooked up with another woman; Davonta says his ex is crazy, and he wants to be free.
Video.title: Dangerously in Love

Video.summary: Tony is sleeping with his girlfriends best friend, Allen. Next Tammy’s fiancée, Ron, has no idea that she's been sleeping with her best friend, Autumn. Later Jan’s lovers, Russ and Ian, find out that Jan has yet another romantic interest in her life.
Video.title: I'm Having A Bi-Sexual Affair
